title: Return to the dark forest
relevance_summary: Frontrunning in the mempool before transactions are confirmed

prevention.rule: Block any tx that has a higher gas price than the average recent gas price and is identical to a tx in the mempool.

red_flags: High gas price transactions identical to transactions in the mempool
summary: Frontrunners use the mempool to frontrun transactions by sending identical transactions with higher gas prices. A guard could block such transactions before they are confirmed.
